entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's career coaching company, domain context for this framework

entities.name: Portfolio Balance
entities.context: Coaching framework check that ensures candidates balance stable opportunities with high-leverage bets

entities.name: Screamer shots
entities.context: High-leverage, low-probability opportunities offering outsized potential returns

entities.name: Search fatigue
entities.context: Psychological depletion from unbalanced job search, caused by over-indexing on moonshots

relationships.context: Coaching frameworks should include Portfolio Balance checks as intervention points
Portfolio Balance prevents search fatigue by ensuring nutritional stability in the funnel
Screamer shots are the 'peak' component balanced against stable 'base' opportunities
